chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D – 4368 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection 2. For order as to maintainability of petition. 07-08-2025 Mr. Khalid Hussain Dahar, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Moazzam Ali, Special Prosecutor NAB. Mr. Muhammad Javed Khalid Rana, DAG. ============= Special Prosecutor NAB has filed a statement that shows that NAB has terminated the investigation in the instant matter. Mr. Mueen Aftab Sheikh has been acquitted in the References he was an accused in and NAB has also withdrawn the acquittal appeals that were filed. Special Prosecutor NAB confirms the aforementioned position. There appears to be no impediment therefore in de-freezing the accounts. Petition is allowed as prayed. JUDGE JUDGE
